pa_indicators.description: EV Incident 'Workaround Provided' is measured daily as unit #. The goal for this indicator is not set. It is the count on data source Incidents.Resolved, which is using the table: incident with the following conditions: Resolved on Today Additional conditions: Resolution code = Workaround provided
pa_indicators.name: EV Incident 'Workaround Provided'

sys_update_version.name: pa_indicators_c26c94a2838ce2108eb710c5eeaad30e
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="pa_indicators"><pa_indicators action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><aggregate>1</aggregate><allow_multi_element_aggregation>false</allow_multi_element_aggregation><benchmarking>false</benchmarking><calendar>standard</calendar><calendar_freq/><collect_breakdown_matrix>false</collect_breakdown_matrix><collect_records>false</collect_records><conditions table="incident">close_code=Workaround provided^EQ<item display_value="Workaround provided" endquery="false" field="close_code" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="false" value="Workaround provided"/><item endquery="true" field="" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="false" value=""/></conditions><contributor/><cube display_value="Incidents.Resolved">4c207c23d7030100b96d45a3ce610308</cube><data_source/><default_aggregate/><default_chart_type>line</default_chart_type><description>EV Incident 'Workaround Provided' is measured daily as unit #. The goal for this indicator is not set. It is the count on data source Incidents.Resolved, which is using the table: incident with the following conditions: Resolved on Today Additional conditions: Resolution code = Workaround
